channel.title: Home on Dillon de Silva
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Dillon de Silva

item.title: A Little Update on Me
item.description: Well Firstly… Needless to say, I haven’t blogged about anything for quite a significant period of time. However, that’s not to say that life has been uneventful. Truth is the last six months have been rejuvenating for me. I travelled overseas to America with my family. I was provided with the incredible opportunity to return to the National Computer Science School. I deleted social media spontaneously for an extended period of time.

item.title: Things I Wish I Knew Before Building a Mobile App
item.description: Here’s the Gist… A couple of months ago, I built an app called ‘Russ’ using React Native. Russ is a free to download iOS app which aims to raise awareness about climate change. From a technical perspective, it was pretty crap when I released the first version. Over time, as I became more familiar with mobile app development I started to pinch myself about things I should’ve done way before I released the first version in order to make the app more kickass.

item.title: What's the Point of this Blog?
item.description: Where do I start? Have you ever sat in front of a computer with the intention of doing something productive? Your mind focuses as you sit in front of the glowing screen where magic is possible. You relax, take a sip of your coffee, place your hands on the keyboard and… nothing This is me right now. A clueless 15 year old who’s not quite sure why he’s starting a blog just yet.
